testcase.name: test_03_create_news
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_22.py:77: in test_03_create_news assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Internal server error","error":"name 'user' is not defined"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_04_get_news_by_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_22.py:86: in test_04_get_news_by_id assert TestNewsCRUD._created_id E assert None E + where None = TestNewsCRUD._created_id

testcase.name: test_05_get_news_by_slug
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_22.py:99: in test_05_get_news_by_slug assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"News not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_22.py:103: in test_06_update_news assert TestNewsCRUD._created_id E assert None E + where None = TestNewsCRUD._created_id
